name: Mikey's Meatloaf
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook carrots and onion in a microwave on high for 3 or 4 minutes to soften.
2. In a large bowl, combine all ingredients and mix well. Add only enough bread crumbs so that the loaf holds together well.
3. Form the mixture into a loaf and place it in an Au gratin or shallow baking pan, large enough to hold it.
4. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C).
5. Cook the loaf for 1 1/2 hours or until the internal temperature reaches 170°F (75°C).
6. Serve with salsa, ketchup, or your favorite sauce.
